dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The alarm blared, a harsh siren signaling the start of another day, another cycle of dread.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BEEP BEEP BEEP

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: Ugh... already?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: My stomach already feels like it's tied in knots. Just thinking about school...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kim Su-hyeon, a second-year high school student, dragged himself out of bed. His reflection in the mirror showed a boy with tired eyes and slumped shoulders. A perfect target.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS (faint)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He tried to be invisible, hugging the walls of the school hallway, but it was always futile.

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: Well, well, well. Look what the cat dragged in.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: N-no...

dialogue.speaker: Bully Minion
dialogue.line: Hey, Su-hyeon! Did you bring our 'tribute' today? Or are you planning on being a cheapskate again?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: I-I don't have any money today. I really don't...

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: What was that? Did you just talk back, you worm?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRAB!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He was dragged into a secluded alleyway behind the school, a familiar ritual.

dialogue.speaker: Bully Minion
dialogue.line: You think you can just show up empty-handed? We've got to teach you a lesson.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK! (Punch to the gut)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: H-huh...!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: Why... why is this always me? Why can't I ever fight back?

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: That's for being late. And this...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KICK! (To the leg)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: A-ah! P-please... stop...

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: I hate this. I hate being weak. I hate myself for letting this happen every single day.

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: That's enough for today. Don't forget tomorrow, worm. And bring double.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS RECEDING

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Slumped against the cold brick wall, Su-hyeon felt the familiar ache spread through his body. His head throbbed, his vision blurred.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: If only... if only I could be stronger. Just once. Strong enough to make them regret it.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DING!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A translucent blue window flickered into existence before Kim Su-hyeon's eyes, shimmering with an ethereal glow.

dialogue.speaker: System
dialogue.line: [NEW QUEST AVAILABLE!]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: What... what is this? A game screen? Am I dreaming?

dialogue.speaker: System
dialogue.line: [QUEST: The First Step]

dialogue.speaker: System
dialogue.line: [Description: Overcome your fear and confront the bullies who torment you.]

dialogue.speaker: System
dialogue.line: [Conditions: Successfully land a punch on the Bully Leader.]

dialogue.speaker: System
dialogue.line: [Reward: Stat increase (random), Skill Card (random), Quest Points (10)]

dialogue.speaker: System
dialogue.line: [Failure Penalty: Permanent 'Coward' debuff, -5 to all stats]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: A permanent debuff?! This isn't a game! This is real!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: But... a stat increase? A skill card? Could this be... my chance?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: Confront them? Land a punch? They just beat me to a pulp! How am I supposed to do that?!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: But if I fail... a 'Coward' debuff... and -5 to all stats. That would make my life even more hellish than it already is.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: This is it. This is my only chance to change. To stop being the weakling everyone steps on.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLENCH (fist)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Su-hyeon
dialogue.line: No more. I won't be a punching bag anymore. I have to do this.

summary: Kim Su-hyeon, a perpetually bullied high schooler, endures another brutal beating from his tormentors. In his despair, a mysterious game-like 'Quest' system suddenly appears, offering him a chance to gain power but threatening a permanent debuff if he fails his first daunting task: to punch his bully leader.
